probe.l1_install: command -v openclaw && openclaw plugins list 2>/dev/null | grep -q lossless-claw
probe.l3_functional: python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('${OPENCLAW_LCM_DB:-$HOME/.openclaw/lcm/lcm.sqlite}'); c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM nodes'); print('ok')" 2>/dev/null

install_hint: command -v openclaw &>/dev/null && openclaw plugins install @martian-engineering/lossless-claw || echo 'openclaw CLI not in PATH — install lossless-claw after PATH is set'
